identity.name: Artist Project 2026
identity.address: Exhibition Place (Better Living Centre, 195 Princes' Blvd)

narrative.summary: Canada's biggest contemporary art fair. 250+ artists, large-scale installations. Opening night party March 26 (6-10pm), fair runs March 27-29. New juried exhibition 'The Art of the Game.' $24-39. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
